title: Implement magic link login (signInWithOtp from /login)
description: Wire the magic link send button on /login to signInWithOtp and redirect to /verify-email.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking 'Send link' on /login calls supabase.auth.signInWithOtp({ email, options: { emailRedirectTo: origin + '/auth/callback' } })

steps.details: document.getElementById('send-magic-link-login').addEventListener('click', async () => { const email = document.getElementById('magic-email').value; const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOtp({ email, options: { emailRedirectTo: window.location.origin + '/auth/callback' } }); if (error) { showError(error.message); return; } window.location.href = '/verify-email?email=' + encodeURIComponent(email); });
